query:
SELECT mc.id, mc.name, mc.displayOrder, mc.isActive, COUNT(mi.id) as item_count
FROM menu_categories mc
LEFT JOIN menu_items mi ON mi.categoryId = mc.id
WHERE mc.name LIKE '%ebida%' OR mc.name LIKE '%Bebida%'
GROUP BY mc.id, mc.name, mc.displayOrder, mc.isActive
ORDER BY mc.displayOrder;
